text.title: LLM Classifier Design Procedure
text.summary: Six-step procedure to ship a cost-minimised LLM classifier.

step.name: define-schema
step.action: Author the output schema with strict types (enum / number / fixed JSON object). No nullable fields.
step.decision-gate: If label set > 5, split into multiple binary classifiers.

step.name: pick-model
step.action: Start with the smallest model in the candidate family. Calibrate.
step.decision-gate: Only escalate if κ < 0.7 on calibration.

step.name: wire-tool
step.action: tool_choice = single-tool forced. Verify the response contains exactly one tool_use block.
step.decision-gate: Smoke-test: 5 items return 5 verdicts in one call.

step.name: batch
step.action: Group items into batches of N (default 50). Each item gets a numeric id 1..N inside the user message; verdicts indexed by id.
step.decision-gate: If output verdicts count != batch size, abort batch + alert.

step.name: calibrate
step.action: Run calibration; record κ. If κ < 0.7, escalate model or revise prompt.

step.name: ship
step.action: Roll out behind feature flag at 10% → 50% → 100%. Watch quality + cost dashboards.
